reviews.review_description: I used to barley play this game, but the updates got very good and really fun. I met the owner and he is very nice and cares about us. 5 stars

So me and my friends Mist, MrFunkyMonkey, and Peanut all played it and thought that the game was both beautiful and fun. My friends call it one of the best gtag fangames but I feel like this game is wayyyy better than gtag so I wouldn't call it a clone. And I LOVE the player models, I would buy a plush of them if I could. And also my friend must met the dev of the game today or yesterday and said he was super nice! Idc that a furry made the game, I mean lethal company is fun, so if there is anyone who doesn't like he game I wanna know why because I can't think of anything bad about it. Also the fact that the gam is so cute but the horror is terrifying is really impressive. That's pretty much all I had to say about the game but yea I wish I could rate it higher than a 5

developer_response.body: We apologize for the fact that you were probably alone, the game isn't so active, making it really boring. How Spunky Monkey VR is a multiplayer game, having no one to play with really ruins the experience, maybe someday you'll come back and give a different rating when having played with some people. Sorry for the inconvenience.

reviews.review_description: i can become a furry monke
This game is awesome, playerbase and cosmetics the only thing bad about it is the updates take for every but other that that 5/5 stars ✨
Really good gorilla tag fan game

Awesome  player model and cosmetics, 
especially the cat ears and halo I really recommend you buy it and give it 5 stars

I can't beleve how good this game is the liting
And every thing  I just don't like it I love and also tips for the game you should ad moderators to the game.   
:)
I love how cartoony the game is and the gamemodes, it is different from normal fangames and there is a lot if things that make it unique, the horror mode actually scared me a lot to
This game is fun and I like the player model and maps and stuff
As a SMONKS I do have to say the game is very spunky

This game is one of, if not the best Gorrila Tag fan game. Especially for a game not fully finished the game still consists of a variety of stuff that makes it a great experience. The physics, colour choice, and developers are all so wonderful. Not to mention how very little bugs there is. Lastly is for such a cute game the horror mode manages to scare me even for just one level.
The gameplay is Just like Gorilla tag and it was AMAZING however you could make a Horror mode maybe if U do I'm Blind and can't find it Lol
My friends and I played this game and can safely say it's the best gtag fan game

Unlike fangames that dont try on their texture n stuff this game is magnificent I’m serious I’m not saying that because I’m a beta tester this game is good and don’t get me started on the graphics and it’s fun to play with friend hope staff or owner sees this bya bye
-sfb(SmallFuzzyBag)
